  X-Frame-Options: DENY

  Content-Security-Policy: default-src 'self';
    script-src 'self' https://js.stripe.com https://www.google.com/recaptcha/ https://www.gstatic.com/recaptcha/;
    connect-src 'self' https://api.stripe.com https://hooks.stripe.com https://db.btsvhgrvknmttuqudqkg.supabase.co https://db.btsvhgrvknmttuqudqkg.supabase.net wss://db.btsvhgrvknmttuqudqkg.supabase.co;
    img-src 'self' data: blob: https://*.stripe.com https://www.gstatic.com/recaptcha/;
    style-src 'self' 'unsafe-inline';
    font-src 'self' data:;
    frame-src https://js.stripe.com https://hooks.stripe.com https://www.google.com/recaptcha/;
    base-uri 'self';
    form-action 'self' https://hooks.stripe.com;
    upgrade-insecure-requests
